loginPage.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the Signature Portal. Please enter the 16-digit eSignature credential to view and sign (or decline) the service provider's agreement.
loginPage.credentialHint: You can find the eSignature credential in the communications sent to you (e.g. email, letter, text message or drop card).
loginPage.errorMessage: You need to enter eSignature credential to proceed

confirmNamePage.confirmCheckboxLabel: I confirm the selected person is me.
confirmNamePage.selectNameError: You need to select a name to proceed

confirmDetailsPage.description: Check your details below and confirm they're correct. To correct any errors in your contact information, click "Edit" and update the details as needed.
confirmDetailsPage.confirmCheckboxLabel: I confirm the details above are correct and mine.
confirmDetailsPage.confirmDetailsError: Please confirm your details are correct
confirmDetailsPage.requiredFieldsError: Please fill in all required fields
confirmDetailsPage.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address
confirmDetailsPage.dataHandlingText: Your data will be handled in accordance with our customer's privacy notice

addAuthorizedSignPage.formDescription: Please share your details that we can use to create the agreement.
addAuthorizedSignPage.legalBasisText: By clicking Submit, I confirm I have a legal basis to provide the details of the authorised signatory/party
addAuthorizedSignPage.dataHandlingText: Your data will be handled in accordance with our customer's privacy notice

signatoryDetailsForm.addressAssociationLabel: What is this person's association with the addresses?
signatoryDetailsForm.requiredFieldsError: Please fill in all required fields
signatoryDetailsForm.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address
signatoryDetailsForm.invalidMobileError: Please enter a valid phone number

notAuthorizedSignatoryPage.formDescription: Share the details of the authorised signatory who can legally sign this wayleave agreement.
notAuthorizedSignatoryPage.legalBasisText: By clicking 'Submit', I confirm I have a legal basis to provide the details of the authorised signatory/party
notAuthorizedSignatoryPage.dataHandlingText: Your data will be handled in accordance with our customer's privacy notice

thankYouPage.subtitle: Powered by Liberty Blume
thankYouPage.heading: Thank you!
thankYouPage.body: An email has been sent to the authorised party.
thankYouPage.closeWindowText: You may now close this window.

confirmSignatoryPage.authorityQuestion: Are you authorised to consent to the wayleave agreement?
confirmSignatoryPage.authorityNo: No, I do not have the authority
confirmSignatoryPage.selectAuthorityError: You need to select an authority option to proceed

inactivityWarning.message: Are you still there? Your session will expire soon due to inactivity

expiredSessionPage.subtitle: Powered by Liberty Blume
expiredSessionPage.message: Your session has expired due to inactivity. Use the eSignature credential to login again
